title: In-Context Learning, From the Inside
tagline: Why a frozen Transformer learns a new task from a few examples in its prompt
summary: A live induction-head toy: a 2-layer attention model trained only on next-token prediction discovers in-context copying — the mechanistic basis of all few-shot prompting. Slide k (the number of in-context examples) and watch accuracy ramp; then read why ICL is just gradient descent in disguise.
highlights: Live 2-layer attention model that learns to copy in-context via the induction-head mechanism.
k-shot accuracy curve: how performance ramps with more examples in the prompt.
Mechanistic story: previous-token head + induction head = ICL on copy tasks.
Why ICL ≈ implicit gradient descent on the prompt (Akyürek et al. 2023; von Oswald et al. 2022).
